recommendations.title: No One Gets Out Alive
recommendations.overview: An immigrant in search of the American dream is forced to take a room in a boarding house and soon finds herself in a nightmare from which she can't escape.

recommendations.title: Infinity Chamber
recommendations.overview: A man trapped in an automated prison must outsmart a computer in order to escape and try and find his way back to the outside world that may already be wiped out.

recommendations.title: Oldboy
recommendations.overview: A man has only three and a half days and limited resources to discover why he was imprisoned in a nondescript room for 20 years without any explanation.

recommendations.title: Escape Room
recommendations.overview: Four friends who partake in a popular Los Angeles escape room find themselves stuck with a demonically possessed killer. They have less than an hour to solve the puzzles needed to escape the room alive.

recommendations.title: The Cat o' Nine Tails
recommendations.overview: A newsman works with a blind puzzle-solver to uncover a deadly conspiracy linked to a genetic research facility.

recommendations.title: Soul Survivors
recommendations.overview: A college freshman involved in a fatal car crash discovers she may not have survived after all when she becomes caught between the worlds of the living and the dead.

recommendations.title: Door Lock
recommendations.overview: Kyung-min lives alone in a one-room apartment. One day, she finds traces of a stranger breaking into her room and soon a mysterious murder case begins to unravel.

recommendations.title: While the Wolf's Away
recommendations.overview: A young teen and his misfit group of friends try to escape from a strict boarding school that holds dangerous secrets.

recommendations.title: Into the Labyrinth
recommendations.overview: When a kidnapping victim turns up alive after fifteen years, a profiler and a private investigator try to piece together the mystery.

recommendations.title: No Escape Room
recommendations.overview: A father and daughter check out a small town escape room and discover there is something sinister about the place.
